D:\cmake\bin\cmake.exe -E rm -f CMakeFiles\llm.dir/objects.a
D:\msys64\ucrt64\bin\ar.exe qc CMakeFiles\llm.dir/objects.a @CMakeFiles\llm.dir\objects1.rsp
D:\msys64\ucrt64\bin\c++.exe -Wl,--whole-archive CMakeFiles\llm.dir/objects.a -Wl,--no-whole-archive -o llm.exe -Wl,--out-implib,libllm.dll.a -Wl,--major-image-version,0,--minor-image-version,0 @CMakeFiles\llm.dir\linkLibs.rsp
